title: Close out epic 0gg: retro + plan next feasible work
description: Run the epic-close retro, then handle integration per .tick/config.md: push the epic branch, open a PR, and do NOT complete close-out until CI (.github/workflows/ci.yml) is green on that PR — no direct merge to main. Capture learnings (esp. any single-file-serialization friction on landing.ts) into .tick/learnings.md if material. Roadmap-level changes are a human decision — propose, don't execute.
acceptance_criteria: Epic retro recorded; epic branch pushed and PR opened; CI green on the PR per .tick/config.md gate; next feasible work identified or roadmap updated
